channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hulu’s Best Overlooked Show Has 100% Critic, 98% Audience Rotten Tomatoes Scores
item.description: Hulu and Disney Plus have a returning show with near-perfect Rotten Tomatoes scores that seems to be vastly overlooked.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Friday, February 13
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Sky Rolls HBO Max, Netflix, Disney+ And Hayu Into Ground-Breaking New Single Subscription
item.description: New package aims to bring value and convenience to today’s increasingly fractured content world.

item.title: Should AI Bots Run Their Own Social Media Network? Not If It’s Like Moltbook
item.description: Moltbook is proof that it takes humans to make social media worthwhile.

item.title: Microsoft Confirms Windows Is Under Attack — Update Now
item.description: Attackers have not waited for Exploit Wednesday; the Microsoft Windows zero-day attacks have already started. Here’s what you need to know and do.

item.title: Tip for tap
item.description: There is plenty of unintentional harm in our world. We’ve all been bruised or derailed by someone who had no ill intent. We often respond with intenti...

item.title: Time well spent
item.description: What an admirable goal. Perhaps the overriding goal of all goals. How often do we measure this? Do we even know how? Do the systems we’re in push us f...

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...
